# Pull Request

Thank you for contributing to GitLFS‑S3!

Please complete the checklist below to help us review your PR efficiently.

---

## 📋 Summary

Explain what this PR does and why it is needed.

---

## 🔍 Type of Change

Select all that apply:

- [ ] Bug fix  
- [ ] New feature  
- [ ] Documentation update  
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup  
- [ ] Security improvement  
- [ ] Other (describe below)

---

## 🧪 Testing

Describe how you tested your changes:

- Steps performed  
- S3 provider used (e.g., Backblaze B2)  
- Git LFS version  
- Any edge cases tested  

---

## 🔐 Verification Requirement

**All PRs must be signed with a verified identity.**

This PR was created using:

- [ ] Verified SSH‑signed commits  
- [ ] GitHub Web UI (auto‑verified)  
- [ ] Other (PR will not be accepted)

Unsigned or unverified commits will be rejected.

---

## 📄 Additional Notes

Add any extra context, screenshots, or considerations here.
